hero.title: Transform Your Workflow
hero.subtitle: A comprehensive platform combining AI face swap, TTS synthesis, OCR text recognition, and video automation in one powerful solution

features.title: Core Capabilities
features.subtitle: Powerful AI algorithms delivering professional-grade automation

face_swap.title: AI Face Swap
face_swap.desc: Advanced deep learning-based face replacement with high-fidelity processing

tts.title: TTS Synthesis
tts.desc: Natural and smooth text-to-speech with multi-language and voice style support

ocr.title: OCR Recognition
ocr.desc: High-precision text recognition supporting multiple languages and complex scenarios

video.title: Video Automation
video.desc: Intelligent video processing including editing, transcoding, and compression

showcase.title: How It Works
showcase.subtitle: Transform your content in just four simple steps

step1.title: Upload Your Content
step1.desc: Upload images, videos, or text files to our secure platform

step2.title: Select Processing Type
step2.desc: Choose from face swap, TTS, OCR, or video automation

step3.title: AI Processing
step3.desc: Our AI algorithms process your content quickly and accurately

step4.title: Download Results
step4.desc: Get your processed files instantly in high quality

tools.title: Explore Our Tools
tools.subtitle: No installation required - powerful tools ready to use in seconds

face_swap.title: Face Swap Tool
face_swap.desc: Upload two images and complete face replacement in one click

voice.title: Voice Synthesis
voice.desc: Enter text and generate natural-sounding speech

ocr.title: OCR Recognition
ocr.desc: Convert images to text with support for batch processing

video_editing.title: Video Editing
video_editing.desc: Smart editing with automatic highlight generation

usecases.title: Use Cases
usecases.subtitle: Powerful solutions for multiple industries and applications

short_video.title: Short Video Marketing
short_video.desc: Generate high-quality marketing videos in bulk to boost brand awareness and engagement

automated_editing.title: Automated Editing
automated_editing.desc: Intelligent highlight detection automatically generates edited versions of your content

digital_human.title: Digital Human Generation
digital_human.desc: Create virtual digital humans for various applications including presentations and entertainment

batch_processing.title: Batch Data Processing
batch_processing.desc: Efficiently process large volumes of images, videos, and text data with parallel processing

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied users who trust SynthWorks

user1.name: Sarah Chen
user1.content: SynthWorks has transformed our video marketing workflow. The automation features save us hours every week.

user2.name: Michael Rodriguez
user2.content: The face swap and video editing tools are incredibly powerful. Best I've used for content creation.

user3.name: Emily Zhang
user3.content: Outstanding platform for processing large datasets. The OCR API is fast and accurate.

footer.description: AI-powered automation platform delivering intelligent solutions for video processing, voice synthesis, OCR, and more.

layout.keywords: AI, automation, video processing, voice synthesis, OCR, face swap

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At SynthWorks, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.collect_intro: We collect information you provide directly to us when you use our services, including:
privacy.collect_2: Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
privacy.collect_4: Files and content you upload for processing
privacy.use_intro: We use the collected information to:
privacy.use_2: Process your requests and deliver results
privacy.use_3: Communicate with you about your account
privacy.use_4: Analyze usage patterns to enhance user experience
privacy.security_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. Your uploaded files are encrypted and automatically deleted after processing is complete.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@synthworks.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to SynthWorks. By using our services, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.acceptance_desc: By accessing or using SynthWorks services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.service_intro: SynthWorks provides the following AI-powered automation services:
terms.user_intro: As a user of our services, you agree to:
terms.user_1: Use our services for lawful purposes only
terms.user_2: Not attempt to reverse engineer or circumvent security measures
terms.user_3: Respect intellectual property rights of others
terms.user_4: Not upload content that violates applicable laws or regulations
terms.user_5: Maintain security of your account credentials
terms.ip_desc: All content, features, and functionality of SynthWorks are owned by SynthWorks and protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of content you upload, but grant us a license to process it.
terms.liability_desc: SynthWorks is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.
terms.termination_desc: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these Terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion.
terms.changes_desc: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how SynthWorks uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our platform.
cookies.what_desc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookies.essential_intro: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly:
cookies.analytical_intro: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website:
cookies.preference_desc: These cookies remember your settings and preferences, such as language selection and theme preferences.
cookies.third_desc: We may use third-party services (like analytics tools) that set their own cookies. These are subject to the respective third-party's privacy policies.
cookies.manage_intro: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
cookies.manage_3: Set notifications for when cookies are set
cookies.manage_note: Note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality and your user experience.
cookies.updates_desc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we use cookies.
